## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Link the spec doc / roadmap item. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — maintenance (deps, ci, config)
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — no functional change

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows Conventional Commits (`feat(scope): …`)
- [ ] No `any` — strict TypeScript throughout
- [ ] Unit tests added / updated; all pass
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npx tsc --noEmit` clean
- [ ] Prisma migration created if schema changed
- [ ] Relevant spec doc updated
